source.reference: POLIS is hiring a Communications Intern - POLIS Network.pdf

description_original.content:
Communications Intern

Organisation: POLIS Network
Location: Brussels, Belgium
Engagement: Internship
Compensation: €1,095/month under the Belgian CIP scheme
Deadline: 24 July 2026
Start date: 28 September 2026
Work arrangement: Hybrid
Source: https://www.polisnetwork.eu/job/communications-intern/
Source documents: POLIS is hiring a Communications Intern - POLIS Network.pdf

## Overview

Six-month communications internship supporting the visibility of POLIS and its network of European cities and regions working on sustainable urban mobility.

## Responsibilities

- Manage POLIS social profiles, social calendar, and analytics across LinkedIn, Bluesky, and Instagram.
- Draft website and Members' Area content.
- Support digital and print publications, including Cities in Motion.
- Produce short videos and visual assets.
- Support projects, working groups, and online and in-person events.
- Take notes and prepare communications reporting.
- Prepare and edit Annual POLIS Conference materials.
- Help print, organise, and display venue signage and handle conference tasks.

## Candidate profile

- Completed degree, preferably in communications, journalism, transport, urban planning, or a related field.
- Initial communications, journalism, or public-relations experience.
- Online content and social-media writing skills.
- Website content management; WordPress is an asset.
- Social management experience; LinkedIn, Bluesky, and Instagram are assets.
- Visual judgement and graphic-design skills; Canva is an asset.
- Interest in urban mobility.
- Excellent written and spoken English; additional European languages are assets.
- Existing legal right to work in Belgium; visa sponsorship is unavailable.

## Offer

Full-time internship from 28 September 2026 for six months. Primarily office-based in Brussels with hybrid work available within Belgium and limited Christmas-period remote work.

## Application

Email a motivation letter and CV to Karen Vancluysen at polis@polisnetwork.eu by 24 July 2026. Subject: Your name and surname - POLIS Comms Intern.

Shortlisted candidates will be notified in August, with interviews planned for the first and second weeks of September.
